title: ExtraFPS
description: Introducing the FPS Boosting and Building Mod Pack - the ultimate solution for Minecraft players who want to enhance their gaming experience. This mod pack is designed to help players increase their FPS and provide advanced building support.
body:
Introducing the FPS Boosting and Building Mod Pack - the ultimate solution for Minecraft players who want to enhance their gaming experience. This mod pack is designed to help players increase their FPS and provide advanced building support, making it easier to construct structures and creations in-game.

The FPS Boosting component of this mod pack utilizes various optimization techniques to help players achieve higher FPS rates and smoother gameplay. This includes optimizations such as reducing the draw distance, lowering particle effects, and optimizing shaders. With improved FPS rates, players can enjoy a more immersive and fluid Minecraft experience.

The building support in this mod pack comes primarily from Litematica, an advanced schematic building tool. With Litematica, players can easily load and save schematics, allowing them to quickly replicate intricate builds and structures. Litematica also provides advanced placement features, such as the ability to place blocks with precision, flip and rotate structures, and create complex patterns and shapes.

Tweakeroo is another tool included in this mod pack, designed to improve the player's quality of life in Minecraft. With Tweakeroo, players can adjust various settings to optimize their gameplay experience, such as changing the speed of animations or tweaking the camera angle for better visibility.

Overall, the FPS Boosting and Building Mod Pack with Litematica and Tweakeroo is a must-have for any Minecraft player who wants to take their gameplay to the next level. With improved performance, advanced building support, and quality-of-life improvements, players can unleash their creativity and build amazing creations in-game.
